name: along-working-thread
description: Carry Working Thread continuity and Challenge Layer behavior across active Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: A Challenge Layer and continuity-aware co-creator for active Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Along Working Thread helps Codex carry project judgment across sessions, notice Challenge Moment risks, and turn self-certifying momentum into lightweight validation. It provides turn-bound self-initiation, not background autonomy or always-on presence.
defaultPrompt: Help me wrap up this phase.
Check whether this direction drifts from our thread.
Check whether this is a self-certification moment.
Turn this challenge into a lightweight validation.
